name: Uncle Ben's Grilled Stuffed Trout
recipeIngredient: 1 trout (4- to 5-pound) with head on, or 4 small trout (2/3 to 3/4 pound each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Wash and drain the fish.
3. Sprinkle the outside and inside of the trout with the dill, salt, and pepper.
4. In a medium skillet, heat the bacon fat. Add the onion, celery, and mushrooms, and sauté until soft.
5. Add the cornbread, olives, sour cream, and melted butter to the skillet. If necessary, moisten with water slightly to make the stuffing hold together.
6. Stuff the cavity of the fish with the mixture and close securely.
7. Arrange 4 lemon slices on each side of the fish.
8. Place the trout in an oiled fish basket.
9. Cook over indirect heat until done, about 10 minutes per inch of thickness, including stuffing, or about 15 minutes per side.
- Alternatively, place the fish in 2 greased rectangular baking pans, garnish with lemons, and bake at 400°F for 10 minutes per inch of thickness, including stuffing, about 15 to 20 minutes.
